person_entity_missing.title: {user_name}: linked person entity no longer exists

confirm.title: Clear the broken person entity link?
confirm.description:
Person entity `{person_entity}` linked to **{user_name}** no longer exists. Auto-assignment still works — the location filter ignores broken links and falls back to weight-only matching — but the configured location signal isn't doing anything.

This will clear the link from the profile. You can link to a different person entity later from **Configure** if you want.

confirm.title: Clear the person entity link?
confirm.description:
User **{user_name}** is linked to person entity `{person_entity}`, but that person has no working device trackers, so its state is `unknown`. Location-based matching only skips a user when their person is `not_home`, so with no tracker this link does nothing — auto-assignment is already using weight-only matching for this user.

If you don't use location-based matching (for example, everyone is usually home at weigh-in time), clearing this link is safe and removes this warning.

Prefer to keep it? Assign a device tracker to `{person_entity}` in **Settings → People** instead (typically the user's phone via the Home Assistant companion app), and this warning will clear on its own.

This will clear the link from the profile.

confirm.title: Remove stale notification target?
confirm.description:
Home Assistant doesn't know about the notify service `{service}` that's configured for **{user_name}**. Actionable notifications sent to it are being silently dropped — usually because the companion app was removed from the phone or the device was renamed.

This will remove `{service}` from the profile. The integration will reload so the change takes effect immediately. You can re-add a notification target later from **Configure** if needed.

user.description: Choose a device to set up

choose_model.title: Choose scale model
choose_model.description: {name} was not recognized as a known model. Choose which supported scale protocol to try — ESF-551 is the most common. If none of them work, please open an issue with debug logs so support can be added.

add_first_user.title: Add User Profile
add_first_user.description: Create the first user profile for the scale

data_description.person_entity: Only used when this scale has multiple users, to skip this user when their linked person is away from home at weigh-in time. Requires the person to have a working device tracker (e.g. their phone via the Home Assistant companion app). Leave blank to match by weight only.
data_description.mobile_notify_services: Select mobile devices to receive actionable notifications for ambiguous measurements. If not configured, you'll still receive the Home Assistant persistent notification.

add_first_user_body_metrics.title: Body Composition Settings
add_first_user_body_metrics.description: Fill in your sex, date of birth and height to calculate body composition metrics

body_metrics.description: Fill in your sex, date of birth and height

error.empty_user_name: User name cannot be empty. Please provide a valid name.
error.duplicate_person_entity: This person entity is already linked to another user profile. Each person entity can only be associated with one scale user.
error.person_entity_no_tracker: This person has no device tracker, so location-based matching can't use it. Assign a device tracker in Settings → People first (typically their phone via the Home Assistant companion app), or leave this field blank.

abort.no_devices_found: No devices found on the network
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.cannot_remove_last_user: Cannot remove the last user. At least one user profile is required for the scale to function.
abort.user_id_generation_failed: Failed to generate unique user ID. This is extremely rare. Please try again.
abort.invalid_user_name: Invalid user name provided. Please try again.

remove_user.title: Remove User Profile
remove_user.description: Select a user profile to remove. Warning: This will remove all measurements for this user.

advanced_settings.title: Advanced Settings
advanced_settings.description: Configure history limits and debugging options

data_description.history_retention_days: How many days to keep weight measurements. Older measurements will be automatically removed. Range: 1-365 days.
data_description.max_history_size: Maximum number of measurements to store per user. When exceeded, oldest measurements are removed. Range: 10-1000 measurements.
data_description.enable_library_logging: When enabled, logs from the underlying etekcity_esf551_ble library will be included in the integration's logs. Useful for troubleshooting BLE communication issues.

error.empty_user_name: User name cannot be empty. Please provide a valid name.
error.duplicate_person_entity: This person entity is already linked to another user profile. Each person entity can only be associated with one scale user.
error.person_entity_no_tracker: This person has no device tracker, so location-based matching can't use it. Assign a device tracker in Settings → People first (typically their phone via the Home Assistant companion app), or leave this field blank.

abort.cannot_remove_last_user: Cannot remove the last user. At least one user profile is required for the scale to function.

assign_measurement.name: Assign measurement
assign_measurement.description: Manually assign a pending weight measurement to a specific user when automatic detection is ambiguous.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The timestamp of the pending measurement to assign (shown in the notification).

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to assign the measurement to.

reassign_measurement.name: Reassign measurement
reassign_measurement.description: Reassign a user's last measurement to a different user.

from_user_id.name: From User ID
from_user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to take the measurement from.

to_user_id.name: To User ID
to_user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to assign the measurement to.

remove_measurement.name: Remove measurement
remove_measurement.description: Remove a user's last measurement (revert to previous or mark unavailable).

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: The unique ID of the user to remove the measurement from.
